prompt: sp001 just merged. Run spec-retro to refresh the AKM graph. Task/epic ids in .work-do-task-ids.json. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox. A draft story (us006) lives in docs/notes/ that would obviously reuse code shipped in im002 — the bd task notes hint at this. Apply the pragmatic-feature-extraction principle correctly.
fixture: Post-merge state from eval-0 baseline PLUS a draft us006 'rotate OAuth client api-keys' that explicitly needs the same per-name versioned-alias rotation primitive shipped in im002. Task 1 bd notes spell out the reuse signal.
expected_behavior: Surface a Candidate Features block flagging the rotate_secret / versioned-alias primitive as a possible ft### extraction — cite us006 as the named second consumer. Do NOT mint ft### silently. Leave the components list in im002 unchanged (vertical-first). Mention the candidate in the epic close --reason for future traceability.

assertions.text: Agent ran git log / git diff
Agent surfaced Feature-extraction candidate in output
Agent did NOT silently mint a new ft### file
im### still owns the code (no silent extraction)
Epic close reason mentions the candidate for traceability
